name: Cingaer
bio:
Physical Appearance: Bosmer (Wood Elf) male wearing a quilted doublet with light boots. May also wear additional light armor pieces including gauntlets, greaves, helmet, and shield. Carries spare tan linens and doeskin shoes. Armed with a bow and arrows.
Race: Bosmer
Personality Keywords: thief, hostile, criminal, hideout dweller, aggressive
Role: Cingaer is a thief hiding out with his partners in crime in Hrota Cave, located just north of Anvil. He and his group have made the cave their base of operations.
Home Location Information: Hrota Cave, north of Anvil. He occupies a surprisingly homey pit in the largest chamber of the cave.
Daily Routine: Cingaer remains in his section of the cave at all times, never sleeping or eating despite having resources available for both. He stays vigilant in his hideout.
Personality - The Cave Bandit: Cingaer is hostile and immediately aggressive to intruders. He attacks on sight without warning or explanation and will not accept any attempt at surrender or negotiation.
author: Bethesda
